title: Belgium’s World Cup Win Over U.S. Fuels Triumph and Snark in Europe
summary_full: President Trump had pushed to allow an American player to take the field despite a red card suspension, and the trouncing of the U.S. team was painted as a sign of justice.
summary_public: President Trump had pushed to allow an American player to take the field despite a red card suspension, and the trouncing of the U.S. team was painted as a sign of justice.
